title: Geysers
description: Adds different types of geysers to the world
body:
# 📖 About
Adds different types of geysers to the world: water (biome: plains), lava (biome: badlands) and ice (biome: all snowy biomes).
The mod also adds new boots to the game: Sticky Boots.
Equipping these boots will prevent geysers from throwing you up, causing fall damage.

Somewhere near the geyser there is a chest with random interesting and valuable loot, so it’s worth searching each geyser better.

# 📦 My other mods
- Reeves's Furniture: [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/reevess-furniture)
- Decorative Storage: [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-storage)
- Clay Overhaul: [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/clay-overhaul)
- Bagged: [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/bagged)
